requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Myanmar MSTRD Voluntary Energy Programme
requirement_topic.zh: 能源效率——缅甸 MSTRD 自愿能效计划
requirement_topic.zht: 能源效率——緬甸 MSTRD 自願能效計劃

summary.en: Myanmar does not have a mandatory ecodesign or minimum energy performance standard (MEPS) for LED luminaires equivalent to international frameworks as of 2026. MSTRD (Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division, under MoST) has adopted a number of MS standards aligned with IEC, but energy performance thresholds for LED lamps and luminaires are not enforced as market-entry conditions. Myanmar's national energy efficiency programmes are nascent; the Department of Energy Planning (DEP) under the Ministry of Electricity and Energy (MOEE) has published voluntary energy efficiency guidelines, but mandatory minimum lm/W, CRI, or lifetime requirements for LED luminaires are not in force. Importers are advised to document product performance data (luminous efficacy, CRI, rated lifetime) to facilitate customs clearance and buyer due diligence, particularly for government procurement channels.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸尚未建立与国际框架相当的 LED 灯具强制性生态设计或最低能效标准（MEPS）。缅甸标准检测研究司（MSTRD，隶属科技部）已采用若干与 IEC 对应的 MS 标准，但 LED 灯具的能效阈值并非市场准入强制条件。缅甸国家能效计划尚处于起步阶段；电力能源部（MOEE）下属的能源规划司（DEP）已发布自愿性能效指南，但 LED 灯具的最低 lm/W、显色指数或寿命要求尚未强制执行。建议进口商提供产品性能数据（光效、显色指数、额定寿命），以便利通关及采购方尽职调查，尤其适用于政府采购渠道。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸尚未建立與國際框架相當的 LED 燈具強制性生態設計或最低能效標準（MEPS）。緬甸標準檢測研究司（MSTRD，隸屬科技部）已採用若干與 IEC 對應的 MS 標準，但 LED 燈具的能效閾值並非市場准入強制條件。緬甸國家能效計劃尚處於起步階段；電力能源部（MOEE）下屬的能源規劃司（DEP）已發布自願性能效指南，但 LED 燈具的最低 lm/W、顯色指數或壽命要求尚未強制執行。建議進口商提供產品性能數據（光效、顯色指數、額定壽命），以便利通關及採購方盡職調查，尤其適用於政府採購渠道。

standards_or_laws: MSTRD voluntary MS standards aligned with IEC 60598 series (luminaire performance)
Myanmar Department of Energy Planning (DEP/MOEE) voluntary energy efficiency guidelines

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), defining three mandatory grades: Grade 1 (≥90 lm/W), Grade 2 (≥80 lm/W), Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W minimum for CN market). China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products under SAMR. CN CCC certification for luminaires covers safety (GB 7000 series) but does not in itself constitute an energy performance certificate.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个强制等级：1 级（≥90 lm/W）、2 级（≥80 lm/W）、3 级（中国市场最低 ≥70 lm/W）。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为市场监管总局（SAMR）管理的强制要求。灯具 CCC 认证涵盖安全性（GB 7000 系列），但本身不构成能效证书。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個強制等級：1 級（≥90 lm/W）、2 級（≥80 lm/W）、3 級（中國市場最低 ≥70 lm/W）。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為市場監管總局（SAMR）管理的強制要求。燈具 CCC 認證涵蓋安全性（GB 7000 系列），但本身不構成能效證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Myanmar has no mandatory MEPS or energy label obligation for LED luminaires as of 2026 — this is a significant difference from the CN market where Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the mandatory floor and CEL registration is required. Chinese manufacturers do not need to adapt product performance specifically for a Myanmar energy regulation, but should document lm/W and CRI data for buyer and government-channel requirements. Myanmar's grid voltage (230 V, 50 Hz) differs from China's domestic nominal (220 V, 50 Hz) — while 50 Hz alignment is beneficial, verify that the luminaire's rated voltage range covers 230 V operation and that any driver is tested at 230 V input.
gap.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具无强制性 MEPS 或能效标签义务——这与中国市场存在显著差异（中国强制最低 3 级 ≥70 lm/W，且须进行 CEL 注册）。中国制造商无需专门为缅甸能效法规调整产品性能，但应提供 lm/W 和显色指数数据以满足采购方及政府采购渠道要求。缅甸电网电压（230 V，50 Hz）与中国国内额定电压（220 V，50 Hz）有所不同——虽然频率相同为优势，但须核验灯具额定电压范围是否涵盖 230 V 运行，以及驱动器是否经过 230 V 输入测试。
gap.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具無強制性 MEPS 或能效標籤義務——這與中國市場存在顯著差異（中國強制最低 3 級 ≥70 lm/W，且須進行 CEL 注冊）。中國製造商無需專門為緬甸能效法規調整產品性能，但應提供 lm/W 和顯色指數數據以滿足採購方及政府採購渠道要求。緬甸電網電壓（230 V，50 Hz）與中國國內額定電壓（220 V，50 Hz）有所不同——雖然頻率相同為優勢，但須核驗燈具額定電壓範圍是否涵蓋 230 V 運行，以及驅動器是否經過 230 V 輸入測試。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — no mandatory MEPS or energy labelling scheme for LED luminaires in Myanmar as of 2026; conformity documentation recommended for government procurement channels
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label (CEL) registration required under SAMR

source.publisher: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division (MSTRD), Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar has no mandatory minimum energy performance standard or energy labelling obligation for LED luminaires as of 2026. MSTRD standards in the IEC 60598 family are voluntary. Chinese manufacturers should document product energy performance data for buyer due diligence and government procurement, and must verify that their luminaires are rated for Myanmar's 230 V / 50 Hz grid.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具无强制性最低能效标准或能效标签义务。IEC 60598 系列的 MSTRD 标准为自愿性。中国制造商应提供产品能效数据以供采购方尽职调查及政府采购使用，并须核验灯具额定电压是否适用于缅甸 230 V / 50 Hz 电网。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具無強制性最低能效標準或能效標籤義務。IEC 60598 系列的 MSTRD 標準為自願性。中國製造商應提供產品能效數據以供採購方盡職調查及政府採購使用，並須核驗燈具額定電壓是否適用於緬甸 230 V / 50 Hz 電網。

requirement_topic.en: MIC Import Permit and Customs Documentation for LED Luminaires
requirement_topic.zh: LED 灯具 MIC 进口许可及海关文件
requirement_topic.zht: LED 燈具 MIC 進口許可及海關文件

summary.en: The Myanmar Investment Commission (MIC) and the Ministry of Commerce (MoC) administer import licensing for regulated goods. LED lamps and luminaires entering Myanmar via Yangon/Thilawa port or Mandalay overland from Yunnan (China) may require an import licence depending on the applicable HS code and the current restricted/prohibited import list. As of 2026, LED luminaires generally fall under Chapter 85 of Myanmar's import tariff schedule. Importers should confirm whether an import licence is required from the Ministry of Commerce for the specific HS heading, and whether any Myanmar-specific conformity declaration or test report referencing an MS/IEC standard is required by customs authorities as a condition of clearance. MSTRD can issue type-test certificates against MS standards upon request.
summary.zh: 缅甸投资委员会（MIC）和商务部（MoC）负责对受管制商品的进口许可管理。通过仰光/迪拉瓦港口或云南（中国）至曼德勒陆路进入缅甸的 LED 灯具，可能需要根据适用的 HS 编码及现行限制/禁止进口清单申请进口许可证。截至 2026 年，LED 灯具通常归入缅甸进口关税税则第 85 章。进口商应确认商务部是否对特定 HS 税目要求进口许可证，以及海关是否要求提供参照 MS/IEC 标准的缅甸特定符合性声明或检测报告作为通关条件。MSTRD 可应要求签发针对 MS 标准的型式检测证书。
summary.zht: 緬甸投資委員會（MIC）和商務部（MoC）負責對受管制商品的進口許可管理。通過仰光/迪拉瓦港口或雲南（中國）至曼德勒陸路進入緬甸的 LED 燈具，可能需要根據適用的 HS 編碼及現行限制/禁止進口清單申請進口許可證。截至 2026 年，LED 燈具通常歸入緬甸進口關稅稅則第 85 章。進口商應確認商務部是否對特定 HS 稅目要求進口許可證，以及海關是否要求提供參照 MS/IEC 標準的緬甸特定符合性聲明或檢測報告作為通關條件。MSTRD 可應要求簽發針對 MS 標準的型式檢測證書。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Import and Export Law (2012) and subsidiary notifications — Ministry of Commerce
Myanmar Investment Law (2016) — Myanmar Investment Commission (MIC)
MSTRD type-test certification service — MS/IEC 60598 and MS/IEC 62560 basis

summary.en: In China, LED luminaires sold in the residential market require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA-C10-01, administered by CQC. Export from China to Myanmar does not require a separate Chinese export licence for standard LED luminaires under current MOFCOM rules (verify current controlled-goods lists). Chinese Customs may require an export customs declaration; origin documentation (Form E under ASEAN-China FTA / ACFTA) may reduce Myanmar import tariff rates for goods of China origin.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售的 LED 灯具须依据 CNCA-C10-01 取得中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CQC 管理。根据现行商务部规定，标准 LED 灯具从中国出口至缅甸无需单独的中国出口许可证（请核查现行管制商品清单）。中国海关可能要求出口报关；东盟-中国自贸区（ACFTA）框架下的产地证（Form E）可能降低中国原产商品进入缅甸的进口关税税率。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售的 LED 燈具須依據 CNCA-C10-01 取得中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CQC 管理。根據現行商務部規定，標準 LED 燈具從中國出口至緬甸無需單獨的中國出口許可證（請核查現行管制商品清單）。中國海關可能要求出口報關；東盟-中國自貿區（ACFTA）框架下的產地證（Form E）可能降低中國原產商品進入緬甸的進口關稅稅率。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
ASEAN-China Free Trade Agreement (ACFTA) — Form E preferential origin certificate

gap.en: The key gap is Myanmar's import licensing framework: whether a specific import licence is required depends on the current MoC notification for the relevant HS code, which may change. CCC certification issued in China is not recognised by Myanmar authorities and does not substitute for any Myanmar conformity documentation. Importers should obtain ACFTA Form E origin certificates to benefit from ASEAN-China FTA preferential tariffs. The Mandalay overland route from Yunnan may be subject to different documentation requirements than the Yangon/Thilawa sea route — verify with the local customs broker.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于缅甸进口许可框架：是否需要特定进口许可证取决于商务部针对相关 HS 编码的现行通知，该通知可能发生变化。在中国签发的 CCC 认证不被缅甸当局认可，不能替代任何缅甸符合性文件。进口商应取得 ACFTA Form E 原产地证书，以享受东盟-中国自贸区优惠关税。从云南经曼德勒陆路进口与经仰光/迪拉瓦海路进口，文件要求可能不同——请向当地报关行核实。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於緬甸進口許可框架：是否需要特定進口許可證取決於商務部針對相關 HS 編碼的現行通知，該通知可能發生變化。在中國簽發的 CCC 認證不被緬甸當局認可，不能替代任何緬甸符合性文件。進口商應取得 ACFTA Form E 原產地證書，以享受東盟-中國自貿區優惠關稅。從雲南經曼德勒陸路進口與經仰光/迪拉瓦海路進口，文件要求可能不同——請向當地報關行核實。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (import licence) — verify current MoC notification for the relevant HS code; MSTRD conformity documentation may be required by customs as a condition of clearance for certain product categories
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC) — CCC certification required for luminaires sold in China under CNCA-C10-01; ACFTA Form E recommended for tariff benefit on Myanmar entry

source.publisher: Ministry of Commerce, Republic of the Union of Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires exported from China to Myanmar may require an MIC/MoC import licence depending on the current HS code notification. Chinese CCC certification is not recognised by Myanmar customs. Importers should prepare ACFTA Form E origin certificates for preferential tariff treatment and confirm whether MSTRD conformity documentation is required for customs clearance on the specific entry route (Yangon/Thilawa vs. Mandalay overland).
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国出口至缅甸的 LED 灯具可能需要根据现行 HS 编码通知申请 MIC/商务部进口许可证。中国 CCC 认证不被缅甸海关认可。进口商应准备 ACFTA Form E 原产地证书以享受优惠关税，并确认特定进境路线（仰光/迪拉瓦 vs. 曼德勒陆路）是否需要提供 MSTRD 符合性文件以完成通关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國出口至緬甸的 LED 燈具可能需要根據現行 HS 編碼通知申請 MIC/商務部進口許可證。中國 CCC 認證不被緬甸海關認可。進口商應準備 ACFTA Form E 原產地證書以享受優惠關稅，並確認特定進境路線（仰光/迪拉瓦 vs. 曼德勒陸路）是否需要提供 MSTRD 符合性文件以完成通關。
